article.title: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
article.summary: From Ethereum’s Glamsterdam to Solana’s Alpenglow, 2026’s most important developments are protocol upgrades, not price charts.

article.title: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
article.summary: UK regulators published an update to a national retail payments blueprint, calling for infrastructure support for tokenization and interoperability with new forms of digital money.

article.title: S&P 500 Trims Jobs-Fueled Gain as Chip Stocks Sink: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A slower-than-anticipated increase in US jobs drove most stocks higher as short-dated bond yields fell on bets the Federal Reserve won’t be forced to raise interest rates any time soon.

headline: Oil Plunges 5% as Saudi Exports Hit 90%

article.title: Oil Deepens Slide as Saudi Exports Reach 90% of Pre-War Levels
article.summary: Oil deepened its slide below pre-war levels as Saudi Arabia ramped up crude exports toward normal rates, extending the recovery in flows from the Persian Gulf and heightening the prospect of a supply surplus.
